title: transfer — background jobs
description: Every user-initiated operation dispatches ImportEntityJob / ExportEntityJob / GenerateSampleDataJob. Those in turn ride Laravel Excel's ->queue() chain (chunk-per-queue-job + Bus::chain) plus our housekeeping jobs (Coordinator, WriteErrorsArtifact, MarkXferJobCompleted, SendXferJobNotification). PruneXferArtifactsJob runs on a schedule.

jobs.purpose: Top-level orchestrator for a single import. Constructs a DynamicEntityImport (extends AbstractDynamicImport implementing ShouldQueue + WithChunkReading + ToModel + WithValidation + WithUpserts + WithHeadingRow + WithEvents + HasLocalePreference), dispatches Laravel Excel's ->queue() chain with the following tail chain: ImportCoordinatorJob → MarkXferJobCompletedJob → SendXferJobNotificationJob. Reads xfer_jobs.mode to select append / upsert / replace / delete strategy.
jobs.notes: tries=1 — chunk-level retries are handled by Laravel Excel + the shard job's own retry contract. Retrying the orchestrator would double-process.

jobs.purpose: Top-level orchestrator for a single export. Constructs a DynamicEntityExport (extends AbstractDynamicExport implementing FromQuery|FromView|FromGenerator|FromCollection + WithHeadings + WithMapping + WithCustomChunkSize + WithCustomCsvSettings + WithColumnWidths + WithColumnFormatting + WithMultipleSheets? + HasLocalePreference), dispatches Laravel Excel's ->queue() chain with the tail chain: ExportCoordinatorJob → MarkXferJobCompletedJob → SendXferJobNotificationJob.

Runs one shard of a sharded import. Wraps a range-limited DynamicEntityImport (rows [offset, offset+limit) or one sheet). Only used when the import request or the entity's #[Importable] configuration marks the run as sharded (large files or #[ImportableWorkbook] with multiple sheets).
Runs one shard of a sharded export. Wraps a range-limited DynamicEntityExport (query rows [offset, offset+limit) or one sheet).

Coordinator sitting at the end of the shard chain. Verifies every shard reached a terminal state, aggregates counters into the parent XferJob, decides succeeded vs partially_succeeded vs failed based on failed-row count + stopOnError policy, and hands off to WriteErrorsArtifactJob when errors were collected.

Coordinator for sharded exports. Merges per-shard files into a single result artifact when the entity is configured for merging (single-file XLSX with N sheets), or produces a zip artifact when merging is not requested. Computes checksum + row_count on the final artifact.
Runs a #[SampleData(factory: ...)]-configured factory to insert fixture records for the target entity within the current tenant scope. Fires SampleDataGenerated on completion.

Composes an errors.csv artifact from SkipsFailures data collected by AbstractDynamicImport. Columns: row_number, sheet_name, source_row (JSON), field, rule, message. Uploads to the artifact disk; links xfer_jobs.errors_artifact_id.

Final housekeeping. Transitions XferJob to succeeded / partially_succeeded based on counters. Sets finished_at + progress_percent=100. The observer wired to `updating` fires the appropriate XferJobCompleted / XferJobPartiallySucceeded event automatically.

Fan out the completion / partial success / failure notification through the notifications module using xfer_jobs.notify_channels (mail / broadcast / database / push). Uses xfer_jobs.notify_locale for the copy.
jobs.notes: Runs on the `notifications` queue — same as every other notification dispatcher. Failure to notify does not un-complete the XferJob.

jobs.purpose: Retention scan. Three passes per run.
steps: PASS 1 (artifact files): SELECT * FROM xfer_artifacts WHERE purged_at IS NULL AND retention_expires_at < now() LIMIT prune_chunk_size. Delete file from disk, set purged_at, null path, emit XferArtifactPruned.

PASS 2 (xfer_jobs rows): For each retention tier (short/medium/long): SELECT id FROM xfer_jobs WHERE retention_tier = tier AND created_at < now() - tier_days AND status IN ('succeeded','partially_succeeded','failed','cancelled'). Cascade-delete (xfer_shards + xfer_artifacts drop via FK).

PASS 3 (stale queued/running sweep): SELECT id FROM xfer_jobs WHERE status IN ('queued','running') AND last_progress_at < now() - stale_hours. Transition to cancelled with cancel_reason='stalled'. This is the 24h auto-cancel guarantee.
PASS 4 (mapping profile hard delete): SELECT id FROM xfer_mapping_profiles WHERE deleted_at < now() - mapping_profile_grace_days. Hard-delete.
jobs.notes: Runs daily 03:30 UTC. Idempotent — no-op when caught up.
